message:
test(fcp3): extend boundary preservation tests for all FCP3 crate domains

Add 20 new E2E tests verifying the extended domain re-exports across
fcp-kernel, fcp-policy, and fcp-evidence:

fcp-kernel (7 new):
- lease types (LeasePurpose, Lease, LeaseHandoff)
- checkpoint types (ComputationCheckpoint, MigrationCapabilityContext)
- computation migration (MigratableComputationState, ConnectorStateModel)
- budget (BudgetEnforcement, BudgetStatus)
- rate limiting (LimitType, BackpressureLevel)
- quorum (RiskTier, NodeSignature, SignatureSet)
- shutdown (ShutdownRequest, ShutdownAck)

fcp-policy (4 new):
- provenance (IntegrityLevel, ConfidentialityLevel, TaintFlag, Provenance)
- approval (ApprovalMode, ApprovalToken, SanitizerReceipt)
- zone keys (ZoneKeyAlgorithm, ZoneKeyManifest, ZoneKeyRing)
- policy bundles (PolicyBundle, PolicyBundleBuilder, PolicyPattern)

fcp-evidence (3 new):
- receipts (OperationReceipt, OperationIntent, IntentStatus)
- supply chain (SupplyChainAttestation, AttestationMaterial)
- checkpoints (ZoneCheckpoint, CheckpointTrigger, ForkEvidence)

Cross-crate identity (3 new):
- kernel::Lease == core::Lease
- policy::Provenance == core::Provenance
- evidence::OperationReceipt == core::OperationReceipt

Total: 32 pass, 3 ignored (pending migration).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
